headline: TSMC Q1 revenue rockets 35% on strong AI demand
summary: TSMC's Q1 revenue grew 35%, the company said Friday, powered by strong AI chip sales.

headline: Gartner shares are trading lower after Barclays lowered its price target on the stock from $180 to $150.
summary: Gartner shares are trading lower after Barclays lowered its price target on the stock from $180 to $150.

raw.headline: Gartner shares are trading lower after Barclays lowered its price target on the stock from $180 to $150.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Gartner, Lowers Price Target to $150
summary: Barclays  analyst Manav Patnaik   maintains Gartner (NYSE:IT) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $180 to $150.

raw.headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Gartner, Lowers Price Target to $150

headline: The future of loyalty is personalized, not universal, perks
summary: AI will enable loyalty personalization on a massive scale by helping brands dig through behavioral data and other relevant information for targeted offers, Gartner predicts.

raw.headline: The future of loyalty is personalized, not universal, perks
